raw_consumer_statement: Citibank denied my fraud claim to have a fraudulent purchase removed. There is no Merchant that can be contacted, nor was there a " Series of Purchases '' made to such a " Merchant ''. This case was a matter of illegal computer activity perpetrated by a scammer pretending to be the IL XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX complete with an illegal website made to look like the State of XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX The scammer alleged I owed {$6.00} in unpaid tolls. Instead, the scammer used the credit card number without authorization to illegally transfer funds using some credit advance Company. I was not charged the XXXX $ fee payment they alleged I owed, but rather a whole separate unauthorized and illegal transaction for {$380.00} plus a {$19.00} cash advance fee charged by Citibank to someone in XXXX, FL. I am corresponding again with Citibank in regard to the fraud complaint to card XXXX. Disagreeing with their decision to drop the case, I wish to proceed with escalation and arbitrate the matter. A police report has also been filed : Case # XXXX XXXX XXXX IL ( XXXX IL ), issuing XXXX XXXX. Again this is regarding the XXXX $ unauthorized third-party scam made to my card ending in XXXX and the {$19.00} fee. In summary, a cyber scammer used my card number to make some kind of {$380.00} purchase with an actual merchant re : XXXX XXXX FL made on XX/XX/XXXX. Believing I was making a one-time {$6.00} payment for unpaid tolls, I was directed to a site made out to be the XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX, but was a site created fraudulently by someone who then used said card to initiate a separate, unauthorized withdrawal of XXXX $ from some actual merchant with no prior affiliation to me. The matter has been filed with the XXXX XXXX XXXX  and I am in the process of filing with the Federal Trade Commission.
